zh.Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯利勒斯
zh.Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut de Mortagne於大約1241年出生在法國時，她的父親Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne23歲，母親Yolande de Coucy17歲。她於大約1260年與Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年在她的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在法國諾爾德帕萊平。

zh-hans.Lillers, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯利勒斯
zh-hans.Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaut de Mortagne于大约1241年出生在法国时，她的父亲Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne23岁，母亲Yolande de Coucy17岁。她于大约1260年与Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1311年在她的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在法国諾爾德帕萊平。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut de Mortagne was born about 1241, in France, her father, Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne, was 23 and her mother, Yolande de Coucy, was 17. She married Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke about 1260, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1311, in her hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Phalempin, Nord, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaut de Mortagne est née environ 1241, à France, son père, Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Coucy, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke environ 1260, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1311, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Phalempin, Nord, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaut de Mortagne um 1241 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne 23 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Coucy 17. Sie hat um 1260 in Frankreich Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1311 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Phalempin, Nord, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut de Mortagne è nata il circa 1241 nel Francia, sua padre, Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Coucy, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke circa 1260, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1311, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Phalempin, Nord, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mahaut de Mortagneが約1241年にフランスで生まれた時，父Chevalier Arnould de Mortagneは23歳，母Yolande de Coucyは17歳であった。約1260年にフランスでSir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebekeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1311年に故郷で71歳で死去し，フランスノードファレンパンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaut de Mortagne(이)가 대략 1241년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Coucy(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 프랑스에서 Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드 프알핀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut de Mortagne nasceu aproximadamente 1241, em França, seu pai, Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Coucy, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke aproximadamente 1260, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1311, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Phalempin, Nord, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut de Mortagne родилась около 1241 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Coucy, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke около 1260 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1311 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности фэлемпин, норд, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaut de Mortagne nació aproximadamente 1241, en Francia, su papá, Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Yolande de Coucy, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir Jean III de Lille , Chatelain de Lille, Heer zu Meulebeke aproximadamente 1260, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1311, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Phalempin, Nord, Francia.
